scope: Add the saved deeper 180 frontier shortlist to the repo-local localhost comparison page

decision_context.prior_state: The localhost frontier page compared checkpoints, but it still required the user to scan the checkpoint blocks before seeing the current top shortlist domains.
decision_context.decision: Render the shortlist winners, breakouts, and speculative domains near the top of the localhost page.
decision_context.why_now: The user asked to see which domain chips the agents have chosen right now, so the shortlist should be visible immediately in the browser.

files_expected.purpose: Localhost frontier review page updated with shortlist-first layout.
Documents the shortlist addition to the localhost frontier surface.

planned_steps: Load the saved deeper 180 shortlist packet in the localhost page
Render winners, breakouts, and speculative domains above the checkpoint comparison
Keep the existing checkpoint comparison intact below the shortlist

commands: Manual review of research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_CHECKPOINTS_2026-03-25.html against the saved shortlist and checkpoint artifacts
expected_checks: The localhost page shows shortlist winners first
The same frontier comparison cards remain available below
The top chips shown match the saved deeper 180 shortlist artifact

guardrails: Do not mutate the saved frontier readouts or shortlist packet in this tranche
Keep the checkpoint comparison page available under the shortlist section
Treat this as a surface-layer improvement only
